landing.tagline: Enrich your tasks, multiply your productivity
landing.heroDesc: The simplest platform to manage, organize, and automate your projects. Everything you need in one place.
landing.trustUsers: More than 5,000 teams in 50 countries trust Task Enrich
landing.mainFeaturesDesc: Powerful tools designed to simplify your workflow
landing.featurePowerfulDesc: Advanced tools when you need them
landing.featureCollabDesc: Work with your team in real-time
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Data and metrics for better decisions
landing.autoDesc: Automate repetitive tasks and save hours every week. Set simple rules and let Task Enrich do the work.
landing.pricingDesc: Choose the perfect plan for your team
landing.ctaTitle: Start today, no credit card required
landing.ctaDesc: Try all features of the Professional plan for 14 days completely free
landing.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions
landing.faqQ1: What are the limitations of the free plan?
landing.faqA1: The free plan includes up to 10 tasks, 1 user, and basic access to all features. It's perfect to get started.
landing.faqA2: Yes, you can upgrade or change your plan at any time. Changes apply at the next billing period.
landing.faqA3: Yes, all our plans include email support. The Professional plan includes priority chat support.
landing.faqA4: We use enterprise-grade encryption (AES-256) and comply with GDPR. Your information is 100% safe.
landing.footerDesc: The simplest platform to manage your projects
landing.benefitCollab: Collaborate in real-time with your team
landing.trustSmartManagement: Manage your tasks smarter and collaboratively
landing.testimonial: Task Enrich has transformed how I organize my work. It's simply amazing.
landing.signupJoinDesc: Manage your tasks smarter and collaboratively
